title: Ontology Version and Source Schema
description: A schema for the set of valid ontology reference files mapping to a CZ CellXGene Dataset Schema Versions

^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+(-.+)?$.description: The version of CellxGene schema that maps to this set of ontology versions

deprecated_on.description: The date this version was deprecated. The format of the date is YYYY-MM-DD. If this is the current verison then this field will be empty.

version.description: version of ontology canonical to this data release, as defined in its source repo

source.description: Source to find and download canonical ontology version for this data release

filename.description: name of ontology file used to build generated artifacts for this ontology data release

additional_ontologies.description: List of additional term id prefixes to extracted from the source ontology file.

cross_ontology_mapping.description: Cross-ontology mapping file that maps this ontology's terms to cross-species equivalent ontology terms.

filename.description: Name of the cross-ontology mapping file.

format.description: File format of the cross-ontology mapping file.

map_to.description: List of ontologies to map equivalent terms to this ontology

url.description: Direct download URL for the ontology file. When present, overrides the URL constructed from source+version+filename. Used for ontologies whose distribution does not follow the {source}/{version}/{filename} path convention.

format.description: File format of the ontology source. Should be specified for all new entries; defaults to 'owl' when absent for backward compatibility with older schema versions. 'owl' is a plain OWL/XML file. 'owl.gz' is a gzip-compressed OWL file decompressed before parsing. 'obo' is a plain OBO-format file. 'tsv' is a tab-separated values file. 'xml.gz' is a gzip-compressed XML file in a non-OWL schema (e.g. UniProt) kept compressed and parsed with a format-specific streaming parser rather than owlready2.
